attacking_style: Opportunistic finisher who capitalizes on chaotic scenarios rather than initiating attacks. Exploits disorganized finales created by late attacks from others within final 500m.
team_tactics: Sunweb positioning allows this rouleur to surf wheels and respond to late moves rather than controlling pace or launching primary attacks.
terrain_preference: Technical, wet finishes where power efficiency and bike handling trump pure speed. Roundabouts and slippery conditions neutralize pure sprinters.
vulnerability: Insufficient data to identify repeated vulnerabilities. Likely struggles in organized bunch sprints against pure fast-finishers given rouleur classification.
key_patterns: Remains seated in wet sprints for power efficiency versus standing competitors.
Tactical maturity shown in adverse conditions, choosing technique over aggression.
Wins emerge from chaos rather than controlled leadouts or solo efforts.
form_trajectory: unknown: single observation from 2019 insufficient to assess trajectory or recent form
